chemistry_overall: Candidate 27 shows promise but needs concentration adjustment, while candidates 15 and 18 face hard mixing failures that cannot be resolved through concentration changes alone. All candidates suffer from dual-criterion mixing failures but candidate 26 achieves the 3.0x reduction target with best conversion potential. All candidates suffer from dual-criterion mixing failures with Da_mass > 1.0 and r_mix > 0.20. Candidate 3 has insufficient conversion below 50% minimum threshold. Candidates 5 and 6 have hard-gate mixing failures and insufficient conversion. Candidate 7 achieves good conversion but fails to meet the 3x residence time reduction target. Candidates 8 and 9 have hard-gate mixing failures making them impossible. Candidate 10 achieves good conversion but severely underperforms the 3.0x residence time reduction target. Candidate 11 has dual-criterion mixing failure (Da_mass=7.68 > 1.0 AND r_mix=0.833 > 0.20) creating a hard gate. Concentration reduction to 0.2 M would improve mixing performance.
